title: TOOL-TELEMETRY: Per-invocation tool telemetry via single choke-point tap in wrap()
consumer_purpose: Capture timing, success/error, and output metrics for every tool invocation through the universal wrap() function, writing structured JSONL records queryable by the existing analytics tool.
claim_atoms: All ~80 tools funnel through wrap() in tool/tool.ts — single instrument point
Effect.tap + Effect.tapError chained at the pipeline boundary capture success and failure with zero mutations to individual tool files
Telemetry I/O is fire-and-forget: .pipe(Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.void)) ensures telemetry failure never breaks tool execution
Error taxonomy maps 5 tagged errors (InvalidArgumentsError, ToolError, TimeoutError, TransientError, ValidationError) via instanceof checks with UnknownError fallback
Analytics tool extended with tool_invocations metric following existing JSONL query pattern
content: See plan_artifact.json for full details. Three fixes: fix-A (tool.ts ~10 lines of tapBoth → tap+tapError), fix-B (analytics.ts query), fix-C (integration test).
